profile.name: Asif Mahmud
profile.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
profile.bio: I am Asif Mahmud — a Senior Machine Learning Engineer and CTO at Alphabytes AI, where we deliver end-to-end AI solutions for businesses.
profile.about: With hands-on experience building production-grade ML systems — from NLP pipelines and LLM-powered chatbots to computer vision products — I specialize in turning complex AI research into real-world applications. I am also a Senior MLE at Bettex (HK) Limited. Through Alphabytes AI, I am actively taking on AI consulting and development projects. Whether you need LLM integration, NLP, Computer Vision, Agentic AI, or custom ML solutions — we can help. I also maintain an active research profile with 4 publications in venues like ICLR and Scientific Reports (Nature).
profile.phdNote: We are actively providing AI services! Reach out at asifmahmudcste@gmail.com or visit alphabytesai.com

news.text: Launched Alphabytes AI — my AI services company. Now actively providing AI consulting & development.
Our fashion AI solution Tryex is now live.
My conference paper got published in Springer from the conference MIET 2024.
